verses.text: Kongcingte a kisehkhenna hih bang ahi hi: Korah behte, Asaf' innkuan sung panin Kore' tapa Meshelemiah ahi hi
Meshelemiah' tapate: Zekhariah a tacil, Jediael a nihna, Zebadiah a thumna, Jathniel a lina
Elam a ngana, Jehohanan a gukna, Eliehoenai a sagihna ahi hi
Obededom' tapate: Shemaiah a tacil, Jehozabad a nihna, Joah a thumna, Sakar a lina, Nethanel a ngana
Ammiel a gukna, Issakhar a sagihna, Peullethai a giatna ahi hi
Ama tapa upa pen Shemaiah sung panin zong a beh sungah ukte ahi tapate a suak hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen siamna lian a nei mite ahi uh hi
Shemaiah' tapate: Othni, Refael, Obed, leh a sanggamte siamna a nei ahi Elzabad, Elihu, leh Shemakhiah ahi hi
Hihte khempeuh pen Obededom' tapate leh amau' tapate leh a sanggamte uh tawh, nasepna dingin siamna a nei mi kician ahi uh hi. Obededom sung panin sawmguklenih pha uh hi
Meshelemiah in siamna a nei tapate leh sanggamte, sawmlegiat nei hi
Merari innkuan sung panin Hosah' tapate: Shimri a ukpi (amah tacil ahih loh hangin a pa in a ukpi-in amah bawl hi
Hilkiah a nihna, Tebaliah a thumna, Zekhariah a lina ahi hi. Hosah' tapate leh a sanggamte khempeuh sawmlethum a pha uh hi
Innkuan pasal lutangte pen kongcingte ahi uh hi. Amaute in a sanggamte uh tawh Topa' biakinn sungah nasep nei uh hi
Amaute in a neu a lian a kibangin a pate uh innkuankuanin amau' kongpi cin' ding ai san uh hi
Nisuahna lam-a dingin ai, Shelemiah tungah tu hi. A tapa, a pil thulamlakpa Zekhariah-a' dingin zong ai san uh a, leilu lam-a dingin ai pha hi
Obededom-a' dingin leitaw lamah hong suak a, a tapa tungah vankoihna inndei kipia hi
Shuppim leh Hosah-a' dingin lampi a paitohna, Shallekheth kongpi san, nitumna lamah kia hi. Galvil leh galvil kimaituah uh hi
Vankoihna inndei kongah nih nihin a om mah bangin nisimin nisuahna lamah guk omin, nisim mahin leitaw lamah li om hi
Tua ciangin nitumna lam-a om lampi inn-a dingin a lampi-ah li omin a inn-ah nih om hi
Hihte pen Korah mite leh Merari' tapate lakah kongcingte a kisehkhenna ahi hi
Tua ciangin Levi mite sung panin Ahijah in Pasian' biakinn vanmanpha koihnate leh a ki-ap letsong koihnate uk hi
Gershon-te beh sung panin Ladan pen innkuan tampi a pian'khiatna mi khat hi a, Jehiel innkuante zong ama sung panin a piang ahi hi
Jehiel' tapa Zetham leh a sanggampa Joel in Topa' biakinn vanmanpha koihnate uk uh hi
Amram mite, Izhar mite, Hebron mite, leh Uzziel mite sung panin
Moses' tapa Gershom-te beh sung panin Shebuel pen vanmanpha koihna a ukte lakah a ukpi ahi hi
Gershom' sanggam Eliezer' suan Shelomith tawh zong beh kinai ahi hi. Eliezer' sung panin a tapa Rehabiah, a tapa Jeshaiah, a tapa Joram, a tapa Zikri, a tapa Shelomith ahi hi
Hih Shelomith leh a sanggamte in, Kumpi David, beh lutangte, leh a tultul leh a zaza-a uk uliante, leh galkap a ukte in a ap uh ahi, a ki-ap letsongte a kikoihna khempeuh uk uh hi
Gal sungah a ngah uh van kinusiate sung panin Topa' biakinn puahna dingin amaute in letsongte ap uh hi
Thumupa Samuel, Kish' tapa Saul, Ner' tapa Abner, leh Zeruiah' tapa Joab in a apsate khempeuh zong, a ki-ap letsong khempeuh Shelomith leh a sanggamte' kepna sungah om hi
Izhar mite sung panin Khenaniah leh a tapate pen Israel-a' dingin uliante leh thukhente-in a pualam nasepna-ah kiseh hi
Hebron mite sung panin Hashabiah leh a sanggamte, siamna a nei mihing tul khat leh za sagih in Jordan nitumna lam Israel tungah Topa' nasepna khempeuh leh kumpipa' nasepna-ah uk uh hi
Hebron mite sung panin Jerijah a ukpi ahi hi. (David' uk a kum sawmlina kumin kikantelna bawl uh a, Gilead gamsung Jazer-ah amaute sung panin siamna lian a nei mihing kimu hi

Kumpi David in Jerijah leh a sanggamte, siamna a nei mihing tul nih leh za sagih, a beh sungah lutang ahite pen Pasian tawh a kisai na khempeuh leh kumpipa' vaite-ah, Reuben mite, Gad mite, leh Manasseh minam alangte tungah a uk dingin a seh hi.
